description_long: This is a military-style twin-engine airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a mid-mounted straight wing configuration. The aircraft features two propeller engines mounted on the wings, a forward-positioned enclosed cockpit with a clear canopy, and a conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with two main wheels under the wings and a nose wheel, all of which appear to be retractable. The exterior is painted primarily in light gray with U.S. Navy insignia and markings, and there are red tips on the propellers and stabilizers. The airplane's design suggests it is built for speed and maneuverability, with aerodynamic surfaces and a robust structure. The windows and canopy are transparent, and the overall build is metallic, likely aluminum alloy, with some plastic and rubber components.
description: A twin-propeller military airplane with a mid-mounted straight wing, tricycle landing gear, and a forward enclosed cockpit, finished in light gray with U.S. Navy markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, twin engines, cockpit canopy, and U.S. Navy insignia.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tail assembly, horizontal stabilizers, and the two main landing gear units.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the propellers, cockpit, and detailed markings on the fuselage and wings.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the twin propeller engines, nose wheel, and the symmetrical wing layout.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets; slight dihedral angle present.
attribute_engine_type: Twin piston engines mounted on the wings, each with a visible propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and one nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted enclosed cockpit with a clear canopy, likely multi-seat based on size and window arrangement.
